decisionRationales.title: Use IndexedDB via Dexie
decisionRationales.rationale: Structured queries, far superior to localStorage for large logs; Dexie provides clean TypeScript generics over raw IDBDatabase.

decisionRationales.title: Keep v1 DB name 'lore' unchanged
decisionRationales.rationale: Avoid breaking existing users on silent upgrade. New DB 'lore_v2' runs side-by-side.
Decouple business logic from Dexie so the service layer can be tested with in-memory fakes.
